gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor steps toward the table, spreads arms wide to show the seven apples, and smiles at the learners
a person leans in slightly, tilts head to one side, and gestures with both hands as if suggesting adding apples
a tutor moves to the number line, points to the number 7, and invites the class to follow along excitedly
a person takes a small step forward, raises one hand to demonstrate jumping, and moves fingers three spaces ahead
a tutor turns to face the students, spreads arms wide, and nods with excitement as they mention landing on 10
a person holds up one hand and counts on fingers, encouragingly asking the learners to show their seven fingers as well
a tutor gestures upward with both hands, enthusiastically prompting the students to add three more fingers
a person shakes their head playfully, smiling and inviting the learners to share how many fingers they now have
a tutor claps hands together cheerfully, leaning toward the students while congratulating them on their addition skills
a person points confidently to an imaginary number line above while stating that 7 plus 3 equals 10, beaming with pride
